title: SKAN is the only unbiased cross-channel iOS attribution — use it as your source of truth proxy
insight: SKAdNetwork is the only iOS attribution method that works independently of ATT status and provides visibility across all ad networks using the same deterministic criteria. It requires no MMP, no third-party vendors, and no probabilistic/fingerprinting models. Even if you rely on probabilistic modeling for daily decisions, always use SKAN data as a validation proxy. It's free, easy to access, and the only attribution method with no inherent ad network bias. Ad network self-reported numbers (including Meta's AEM) should be treated as proxies, never sources of truth.
raw_excerpt: Even if your company heavily relies on probabilistic modeling to analyze the data or make business decisions, I recommend always using SKAN data as a proxy. It's free, easy to access, and the only attribution method with visibility across the board and no bias attached.
source_title: The complete guide to SKAdNetwork for subscription apps — RevenueCat
actionable_steps: Always use SKAN data as a validation layer even if you rely on probabilistic attribution day-to-day
Don't treat ad network self-reported numbers (AEM, Google's modeled data) as ground truth
Set up the SKAN endpoint in info.plist to receive raw postback copies directly from Apple
Compare SKAN data across all networks using the same criteria to identify true channel performance

title: Post-ATT winners and losers: Apple Search Ads, web-to-app, and TikTok gained; Meta and Google lost
insight: The post-ATT/SKAN era produced clear winners and losers among ad channels. Winners: Apple Search Ads (operates deterministically regardless of ATT), web-to-app funnels, TikTok, and influencer marketing. Losers: Meta, Google, X, and Snapchat — all lost signal quality. Ironically, Apple itself is a loser because many ad networks still use IP-based matching and fingerprinting instead of adopting SKAN, gaming networks like AppLovin/Unity haven't adopted the technology, and Apple failed to provide developers with adequate tools to use SKAN independently. Android remains the best environment for deterministic ROAS measurement.
raw_excerpt: The winners: Apple Search Ads, Web to app, TikTok, Influencers. The losers: Google, Meta, X, Snapchat. One of the biggest losers after many years is Apple itself.
source_title: The complete guide to SKAdNetwork for subscription apps — RevenueCat
actionable_steps: Prioritize Apple Search Ads for iOS — it has deterministic attribution independent of ATT
Invest in web-to-app funnels as a measurement-friendly acquisition strategy on iOS
Use Android as your primary environment for deterministic ROAS measurement and creative testing
Don't trust fingerprinting-based attribution from non-SANs — validate against SKAN data
